stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
In flight, under normal conditions, what should each one of the three IRU mode selector switches be set to?

options.a: ATT during steep turns, thus providing increased accuracy for pitch and roll.
options.b: ATT, as it is the rightmost position, it superimposes NAV and ATT modes.
options.c: NAV, thus providing the outputs of acceleration, attitude and heading aligned to True North.
options.d: NAV, although attitude information is not available in this mode.
